title: AF follow-up

red_flags.text: Supports clinician-led review of stroke and bleeding risk, comorbidities, echocardiography context, symptoms, patient preferences, information, adherence, and a documented care package.
red_flags.rationale: The NICE section supports an AF follow-up history, symptom and function review, cardiac-function context, patient preferences, and a documented personalised care review without generating treatment.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-led review of stroke and bleeding risk, comorbidities, echocardiography context, symptoms, patient preferences, information, adherence, and a documented care package.

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.2.1-1.4.3 - stroke and bleeding risk, cardiac function, and personalised care

red_flags.text: Supports documenting clinician-performed benefit-risk discussion, adherence and control review, renal and bleeding context, annual reassessment, and documented decisions without generating a medicine choice or dose.
red_flags.rationale: The anticoagulation review section supports documenting annual risk, adherence, control, renal and bleeding review and clinician decisions; it does not select or dose an anticoagulant.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Supports documenting clinician-performed benefit-risk discussion, adherence and control review, renal and bleeding context, annual reassessment, and documented decisions without generating a medicine choice or dose.

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.6.1-1.6.17 and 1.11.1-1.11.2 - anticoagulation discussion and review

additions.text: Supports clinician-led review of stroke and bleeding risk, comorbidities, echocardiography context, symptoms, patient preferences, information, adherence, and a documented care package.

additions.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-led review of stroke and bleeding risk, comorbidities, echocardiography context, symptoms, patient preferences, information, adherence, and a documented care package.

source_limitations: AF type and burden, rhythm and rate, symptoms, stroke and bleeding inputs, cardiac function, medicine name and dose, adherence, renal function, bleeding, interactions, ECG result, care plan, treatment decision, referral, and follow-up interval remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
